mapper.select: select sd.dept_id, sd.name, sd.parent_id, sd.create_time, sd.merchant_id, sd.dept_number, sd2.name as parentName from sys_dept sd left join sys_dept sd2 on sd.parent_id = sd2.dept_id where sd.dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.update:
update sys_dept set del_flag = '1' where dept_id in
#{id}
